creator: rea@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->rea

Taking my own PR. 

Next time, please, either start the Subject line of PR with 
'[patch] mail/exim' or Cc the maintainer: I had spotted this 
PR only by occasion. 

The patch at 
http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/ports/exim/update-4.76-to-4.77.diff 
should fix the XCLIENT patch along with the update to 4.77. 
Please, test the patch and report back any outcome from the 
update. 

Thanks!
